name: Stuffed Artichoke Bottoms"fondi Di Carciobo Farciti
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces speck or Prosciutto di Parma, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes in their skins until they can easily be pierced with a knife; drain, peel, and mash them.
2. Discard the coarse outer leaves from each artichoke and cut away the toughest part of the stem. Place trimmed artichokes in a bowl of cool water acidulated with half the lemon juice to prevent discoloration.
3. In a large pot, bring 4 cups of water, remaining lemon juice, white wine, bay leaf, cloves, and salt to a boil. Cook for 20 minutes.
4. Add artichokes to boiling water and cook until tender but not soft, about 5 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and dry on paper towels.
5. Using a paring knife, remove stems and leaves; scoop out the tender heart from each artichoke. You'll have 8 artichoke bottoms and trimmings.
6. Combine the artichoke trimmings in a food mill and pass through into the bowl of mashed potatoes. Add salt, pepper, and half the olive oil.
7. Pipe the mixture evenly into the artichoke bottoms using a pastry bag with a fluted tip.
8. Arrange stuffed artichokes in an oven-to-table dish. Preheat the broiler.
9. Saute diced speck or Prosciutto in remaining olive oil for 1 minute; it should not brown or crisp.
10. Top artichokes and filling with pine nuts, then broil until heated through and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
11. Serve immediately. SERVES 6
